name: property managers handling 5–15 lease payments/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 lease payments/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of payment schedules.
problem_solved: Late rent payments leading to cash flow issues.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Late rent payments leading to cash flow issues.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 5–15 lease payments/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of payment schedules.

one_liner: For property managers processing 5–15 lease payments/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of payment schedules.
